name: AMZ Prep — Freight Bidding Agent v2

nodes.name: 📧 Gmail Trigger — Inbound RFQ
nodes.notes: Workflow 1 — Polls for new RFQ emails every minute

parameters.text:
You are extracting data from THIS SPECIFIC EMAIL ONLY.
Do not invent or assume any values.
Every field must come directly from the email text below.

Email Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Email From: {{ $json.from }}
Email Body: {{ $json.text }}

Extract and return ONLY this JSON using ONLY values found in the email above:

{
  "origin": "city, state — extract from email body",
  "destination": "city, state — extract from email body",
  "weight_lbs": number from email or null,
  "dimensions": "LxWxH inches from email or null",
  "freight_class": "string from email or null",
  "hazmat": false unless email says hazmat,
  "accessorials": [],
  "required_pickup_date": "YYYY-MM-DD from email or null",
  "customer_name": "name from email signature",
  "customer_email": "email address of sender",
  "special_notes": null
}

IMPORTANT: Return ONLY the JSON object. No markdown. No explanation. Start with { end with }

options.systemMessage: You extract structured freight data from emails. Return ONLY a raw JSON object. Never invent data. Never add markdown or explanation.

nodes.name: 🔧 Parse AI Agent Output
nodes.notes: Strips markdown fences from Groq output and parses clean JSON

nodes.name: ⚙️ Build Freight Record
nodes.notes: Builds complete freight record with quote ID, markup rules, carrier list

nodes.name: 📊 Google Sheets — Log Freight Record
nodes.notes: Log intake record to Freight Pipeline tab

nodes.name: 🔗 HubSpot — Create Deal
nodes.notes: Create HubSpot deal at INTAKE stage

nodes.name: 🔀 Split — One Item Per Carrier
nodes.notes: Creates 6 parallel items — one per carrier

nodes.name: 📤 Gmail — Send RFQ to Carriers
nodes.notes: Send RFQ email to each carrier — replace sendTo with real carrier emails in production

nodes.name: 📧 Gmail — Poll Carrier Responses
nodes.notes: Workflow 2 — Polls for carrier replies containing FQ- in subject

nodes.name: 🔍 Parse Carrier Rate — Regex (No Hallucination)
nodes.notes: Replaces AI Agent1. Extracts real rate data from carrier email using regex. Zero hallucination — only reads actual email content.

nodes.name: 📊 Sheets — Log Rate Response
nodes.notes: Log each carrier rate to Rate Responses sheet

nodes.name: ⏱️ Check Timer / Response Count
nodes.notes: Checks if 2-hour bidding window has expired. Set timerExpired = true to always trigger re-bid during testing.

nodes.name: 🔀 IF — Trigger Re-Bid?
nodes.notes: YES → re-bid round. NO → wait for more responses.

nodes.name: 🏆 Re-Bid Engine — Find Lowest + Build Message
nodes.notes: Finds lowest rate, builds re-bid message for non-winners

nodes.name: 📤 Gmail — Send Re-Bid to Carriers
nodes.notes: Sends urgent re-bid to non-winning carriers

nodes.name: 💰 Markup Engine — Calculate Sell Rate
nodes.notes: Applies customer markup. FedEx $875 × 1.15 = $1007 sell rate

options.systemMessage: You are a professional logistics coordinator for AMZ Prep. Write clear, confident freight quote emails. Never reveal carrier names or internal costs. Never use placeholder text like {{variable}}.

nodes.name: AI Agent Claude Generate Quote Email

parameters.subject: =Freight Quote {{ $('💰 Markup Engine — Calculate Sell Rate').item.json.quote_id }} — ${{ $('💰 Markup Engine — Calculate Sell Rate').item.json.sell_rate }} | Valid 4 Hours

nodes.name: 📤 Gmail — Send Quote to Customer
nodes.notes: Sends final quote email to customer with real sell rate in subject

nodes.name: 📧 Gmail — Poll Customer Response
nodes.notes: Workflow 3 — Polls for customer approval/rejection replies

parameters.text:
You classify customer email responses to freight quotes.
Return ONLY valid JSON. Never add explanation.

Classify this customer reply:

{
  "classification": "APPROVED" or "REJECTED" or "NEGOTIATING" or "UNCLEAR",
  "confidence": "HIGH" or "MEDIUM" or "LOW",
  "lost_reason": "price_too_high" or "used_competitor" or "shipment_cancelled" or "other" or null,
  "competitor_rate": number or null
}

Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Body: {{ $json.text }}

Rules:
- APPROVED: customer says yes, approved, go ahead, confirmed, looks good
- REJECTED: customer says no, cancel, too expensive, went with someone else
- NEGOTIATING: customer wants lower rate or asks questions
- UNCLEAR: ambiguous, needs human review

Return ONLY the JSON object.

options.systemMessage: You classify customer responses. Return ONLY a raw JSON object. No markdown. No explanation.

nodes.name: AI Agent Claude Classify Customer Response
🔧 Parse Classification Output
nodes.notes: Parses Claude classification output. Falls back to keyword detection if JSON parse fails.

nodes.name: 🔀 Switch — WIN or LOSS
nodes.notes: Routes to WIN or LOSS branch based on parsed classification

parameters.subject: =✅ PROCEED — {{ $json.quote_id }} | Customer Approved
parameters.message:
=The customer has approved the shipment for quote {{ $json.quote_id }}.

Please proceed with the booking and send the Bill of Lading (BOL) to freight@amzprep.com.

Reference all communications with: {{ $json.quote_id }}

Thank you,
AMZ Prep Logistics

nodes.name: 📤 WIN — Notify Carrier to Proceed
nodes.notes: WIN: Notify carrier to proceed and request BOL

nodes.name: 📊 WIN — Update Sheets to APPROVED
nodes.notes: WIN: Update pipeline record to APPROVED status

nodes.name: 📊 LOSS — Log Lost Reason + Competitor Rate
nodes.notes: LOSS: Log reason and competitor rate for analytics

parameters.subject: =❌ CANCELLED — {{ $json.quote_id }} | Do Not Proceed
parameters.message:
=Unfortunately the customer has declined this shipment for quote {{ $json.quote_id }}.

Please do not proceed with booking.

We appreciate your competitive pricing and will keep you in mind for future shipments.

AMZ Prep Logistics

nodes.name: 📤 LOSS — Notify Carrier Cancelled
nodes.notes: LOSS: Notify carrier shipment was declined

json.subject: Freight Quote Needed ASAP
json.text: Hi, we need to ship 800 lbs from Chicago IL to Dallas TX. Pickup needed by Friday April 10th. No hazmat. Dimensions 48x40x60 inches. Contact: sarah@sportgear.com

json.subject: Re: Freight RFQ — FQ-1743961234000 | Rate Response
json.text:
Hello,

Thank you for the rate request FQ-1743961234000.

Our best rate for this shipment is $875.
Transit time: 3 business days.
No accessorial charges.
Available for requested pickup date.

FedEx Freight Team
